ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Randi Techiman appearing via zoom for Kevin O'Conner(petitioner).

Mr. Techiman stated that the executor needs to sell the house to pay tax debt and then can close the estate. The beneficiary is the trustee and will waive accounting. Status petition for acccounting is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Maloney: Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-08-2023 Continued To Jun-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Continued To Feb-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 12, 2007 and the codicil dated April 28, 2016 are admitted to probate. Kevin O'Connor is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed. Status on close of estate is set for January 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed at least two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Frank Mahoney is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2021 Continued To Dec-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
